text: Paraffin sections underwent sequential processing through xylene dewaxing and graded ethanol hydration, followed by three PBS rinses (5 minutes each). Following 15–30-minute fixation with 4% paraformaldehyde at room temperature, heat-mediated antigen retrieval was conducted by immersing sections in sodium citrate buffer (pH 6.0) at 95°C for 20 minutes with subsequent natural cooling.
